outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to massive positive GEX across all expiries; dealers are long gamma, stabilizing the market.
outlook.summary: Market makers are heavily long gamma, indicated by a massive positive Total GEX. This creates an environment of suppressed volatility where dealers buy dips and sell rips, effectively pinning the price. The extremely high Put/Call ratio reflects crowd bearishness, which structurally reinforces robust support levels against deep drops.

levels.motivazione: Significant Call OI across all three expirations (0DTE 13k, Weekly 2.2k, Monthly 14k) creates a major structural ceiling.
Dominant Put OI across 0DTE (23k), Weekly (2.6k), and Monthly (29k). Establishes the ultimate structural floor.
Heavy Call OI in 0DTE (8k) and Weekly (9.6k) just above spot acts as an immediate pinning and resistance level.
Monthly Gamma Flip level. A breach below this shifts dealer hedging paradigms from long to short gamma, increasing volatility.
Highest single OI strike in 0DTE (18.2k calls) acts as an intraday magnetic ceiling and dealer hedging trigger.
Strong Put OI in both 0DTE (7.2k) and Monthly (9.3k), reinforced by the bearish smirk skew, validating robust support.
0DTE Max Pain level where option value is minimized. Acts as a strong gravitational pull for the daily session.
